description: Alex, 17, lives with aunt full-time, aunt pays all expenses.
Maria, 25, grad student in university housing, stipend covers living expenses.
James, 15, lives with parents during school year, summers with grandparents.
Linda, 45, lives with adult daughter, earns $5,000, daughter provides >50% support.
Carlos, 19, dropped out, earns $8,000, parents provide majority of support.
Sophie, 16, foster family provides all support. SMT extended with is_eligible_foster_child.
